metadata.description: GMTD — Get More Things Done. An AI-run productivity system inspired by David Allen's Getting Things Done®.

plugins.name: gmtd
plugins.description: An AI-run productivity system inspired by Getting Things Done®. Capture anything, let the AI clarify and organize it, always know your next action. Optional Big 3 / 1-3-5 / Eat-the-Frog planning styles, focus sessions, due dates, visual dashboard. 5 skills: setup, inbox, now, done, review.
